title: Grean Fictions
original_title: เกรียน ฟิคชั่น
overview: Highschool boy Tee and his friends are making off films. But in the real life, Tee can't control his life. Especially about his secret love with Ploydao, a beautiful classmate. Until he made a big mistake that changed his life completely.
